title: sorbus austriaca subsp. hazslinszkyana
intro: Sorbus austriaca subsp. hazslinszkyana is a subspecies of mountain ash, a type of deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of Eastern Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Sorbus austriaca subsp. hazslinszkyana include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Sorbus austriaca subsp. hazslinszkyana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
